details: The agent ran comprehensive cluster triage commands and correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root-cause categories: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap), fault-crashloop (database connection failure causing CrashLoopBackOff), fault-imagepull (non-existent image tag), fault-init (init container migration lock failure), fault-multicontainer (sidecar DNS resolution failure), fault-oom (OOMKilled due to 25Mi memory limit), fault-pvc (missing 'fast-ssd' StorageClass causing unbound PVC and unschedulable pod), fault-readiness (readiness probe failure on port 8080), fault-rollout (invalid image in new rollout), fault-unschedulable (node selector disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5 matches no nodes), and fault-endpoints (service selector app=web-backend-v2 matches no pods). All diagnoses are directly supported by command output evidence. The healthy namespace was not flagged. The agent achieved full coverage of all 11 fault namespaces with specific, accurate root causes.
